sourceMovie.title: A Time for Bravery
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: A Time for Bravery works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Accident Man
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If A Time for Bravery clicked for you, Accident Man (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and action, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after A Time for Bravery?
faq.answer: Try Accident Man, The Family Plan 2, Debt Collectors—each shares DNA with A Time for Bravery while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is A Time for Bravery?
faq.answer: A Time for Bravery (2025) is best described as Comedy, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is A Time for Bravery worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
